creator: jkim@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 223719
Fix crash with libssh2

When libssh2 is enabled, it may crash if keyboard interactive is enabled.  Luckily, the upstream already fixed the problem.

https://github.com/curl/curl/issues/6691
https://github.com/curl/curl/commit/1803be5746aeff88cdd5a9f4a205917d9b15b964.patch
